Xiaoli-san、Aizawa-san

お疲れ様です。S-Proログイン時に毎回下記エラーが表示されるのですが、こちらは何か問題が起きているということでしょうか？

rootcause:

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][PG] CHQ mapping-Yamada Yoshie to サンデー
long_description:
Regarding Yamada Yoshie-san (yamada.y.2@pg.com), business has applied a CHQ Mapping for 2002187968 サンデー, but there is no registration in the April contact document.

There is no Yamada-san in the April Mapping.

Please register the mapping so that Yamada-san is able to create and post the contact document.
Thank you.
 

______________________________________________________

[S-Pro] 閲覧権限追加の依頼
Yamada Yoshie-sanですが、CHQ MappingでサンデーにMapping申請しているのですが、４月の連絡文書を見ると　登録がありません。
こちら登録お願いできないでしょうか？
 

４月分には　共有にYamada-sanがありません。

A-0024876 | 本部活動指示 | Salesforce
rootcause:
Kam user Yamada Yoshie (yamada.y.2@pg.com) does have active UserMapping records covering CHQ 2002187968.
But the PO A-0024876 is not assigned to CHQ 2002187968, but to CHQ 2002869873 サンワ-Zakka, which Yamada-san does not have UserMapping records for. This is why she is not added to the sharing list of this PO.
In the User CHQ master file, there are no rows for Yamada-san with the CHQ 2002869873.
resolution_notes:
We've checked the PO survey under CHQ 2002187968, and we can see that Yamada-san has Read/Write access to the PO survey.
Business has confirmed and requested to close the ticket.
Business has stated that they will open a new ticket if needed.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][PG] Error regarding PO
long_description:
User details:
Sumida-san（sumida.s@pg.com）
CHQ: ウェルシア HD
CHQ ID:  2002293145

User is experiencing the following error when accessing CHQ ウェルシア's May contact document
https://jppaperlesssfa.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/AuditTask__c/a0aKY000001J3ePYAS/related/AuditDetails__r/view
(1) Unable to attach data to the PO.
 
(2) "File Attachment" item does not appear and cannot access the files even after opening the PO.
 
Business has reported the above two errors.
User has already switched to Lightning Mode and possess both access and editing privileges to the contact document.

Please do an analysis on the error.
Thank you very much.

______________________________________________________

[S-Pro] S-proErrorご確認のお願い
@DataHubJP, Ionご担当者様
お疲れさまです。
表題の件、
CCのSumida-sanがウェルシアの5月連絡文書にアクセスする際下記のエラーが発生しています。
https://jppaperlesssfa.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/AuditTask__c/a0aKY000001J3ePYAS/related/AuditDetails__r/view
①本部活動指示へのデータ添付ができない
 
②本部活動指示を開いても『ファイル添付』の項目が出てこずファイルに飛べない

尚、Lightningへは切替済みで連絡文書へのアクセス権限・編集権限もともにお持ちです。

Errorのご確認をお願いできますでしょうか。
お忙しいところ恐れ入りますがどうぞよろしくお願いいたします。

會澤　茉林/ Marin Aizawa

※もしQuestionIDに間違いがありましたら再度リストのご送付をお願いいたします。

何卒よろしくお願いいたします。

rootcause:
Upon checking the RITM5648223 Electro MST file, business told us to create a new store 2003257202 and UST-Master record under the user pb47md@icloud.com.Later business told us to change the account owner to the User ID- pb34md@icloud.com.

The newly created store was changed to the new account owner but the UST-Master was still under the pb47md@icloud.com. So this is reason the affected user unable to see the store in their I-pad.

Solution: New UST-Master records for the user pb34md@icloud.com have been created under the store 2003257202.
resolution_notes: Business has confirmed the store is being displayed. Received closure confirmation from business.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][PG]Unable to access S-Pro
long_description:
I have been trying to access SPRO and have been unable to do so, as shown below,
I am contacting you to ask for your assistance in dealing with this situation.

We have tried rebooting, VPN connection, etc., but without any effect.
We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause, but we are still unable to revise the May communication document, so we would appreciate it if you could provide us with some urgent guidance.

Thank you in advance for your cooperation.

______________________________________________________

[S-Pro] SPROへのアクセスができない件について
ご担当者様

お疲れ様です。
セールスの森と申します。

表題の件、SPROにアクセスしようとしたところ下記のように、アクセスができない状態が続いており、
対応方法をご教示いただきたくご連絡させていただきました。

再起動、VPN接続などは行ってみたのですが効果がなく、、、。

何卒よろしくお願いいたします。

P&Gジャパン合同会社
営業統括本部

E-mail: mori.a.5@pg.com
rootcause: When user tried to upload the data it had historical data, which was more than past 13 months, for which error was thrown by SFDC while uploading, Currently we keep historical data only for 13 months. resolution_notes: Business confirmed that she can access to SPro and requested to close the ticket.

rootcause: PO approval has not been completed.
resolution_notes:
Upon our initial Investigation we found that the changes are not reflected because according to PO logic if KAM user makes any changes in PO then he needs to reassign it to SV and complete the Approval process. After the approval process are completed ,the changes can be reflected.

PO Changed on 6/10 but the last Assigned Date is still 5/29

Business has confirmed that the PO approval has not been completed and requested to close the ticket.

會澤　茉林/ Marin Aizawa 
P&G Japan K.K. Sales　SDOteam

rootcause: None. If there isn't any document after filtering with a specific category, it means that there isn't any document linked to this category
resolution_notes:

Closed after 2 unanswered follow ups.

description: [S-Pro] [Zakka][PG]Bugs in Spro during photography and TRAX operation
long_description:
Regarding the title, as shown in the image below, the following bug is occurring when we open Spro, start entering the store, move to TRAX to work during that time, and then return to Spro.
Also, although it did not happen before, recently, the same bug has been happening after taking a picture in the PO in Spro.
When this happens, I have to exit the application and re-login, which happens at least 5 times a day.
Also, there is someone else on the 3S team who is experiencing the same bug with the same phenomenon besides me.

 

Thank you very much for your time, and please check if there are any ERRORS, etc.


______________________________________________________

DataHubJP 担当者さま

お疲れ様です。
Sector Retail Teamで3S Teamの立見です。
表題の件、下記画像の通り、Sproを開いて入店開始し、その間TRAXに移って作業をして、その後Sproに戻った時に以下のようなバグが起きています。
また以前はなかったのですが、最近では、Sproの本部指示における写真を撮影したあとにも同様のバグが起きていることがあります。
こうなってしまうと、一度アプリから出て再ログインしなくてはならず、それが1日に5回以上起きています。
また、3Sチームには、私の他にも同じような現象のバグが起きている人がいます。

 

お忙しいところ大変恐れ入りますが、error等ないか、ご確認をお願いいたします。
どうぞよろしくお願いいたします。

Best regards,

Kozue Tatsumi / 立見 梢
3S team｜Sector Retail Team
Sales｜P&G Japan
tel: 070-7964-0811
E-mail: tatsumi.k@pg.com
rootcause: This might be the same issue as the case that has been continuously handled in PR ticket PRB0112851. (Similar issue with INC12905806)
resolution_notes: Reinstalling the latest Debug version. Received ticket closure information from business.

rootcause:
Following scenarios may cause the photo to be uploaded failed:

1. The file record is uploaded, but mobile doesn't get the response from salesforce because of the weak connection. In this scenario, you can view the file record without attachment in the salesforce, but the upload process of the image actually is not triggered.
2. During the upload process, user let the device into the sleep mode. In this scenario, mobile can't upload the image
resolution_notes:
What should users do when the photo is uploaded failed?

1. Check the connection. If the signal is weak, it's better to go to the place where has good connection to upload the photo.
2. Check if the call data has been uploaded successfully, if not, user should click the sync button on the right-top corner to upload the call data.
3. If the call data has already been uploaded successfully, user can click the sync button besides the photo sync log to trigger the upload process.
4. User can upload the DB file by clicking the Export DB button in the user profile page. Then we can check if the file record was created correctly, or if the upload process was successfully triggered at that time. But please notice that if user had completed the initial sync after uploading photo, these information would have been cleared.

Business has confirmed and requested to close the ticket.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][PG]No ☑️ is attached on the visit plan screen and Screen blank when starting a visit at some stores.
long_description:
Affected user : higashisaka.r@pg.com

I was making a retailer call today and on Spro.
(1) No ☑️ is attached on the visit plan screen even though a store has been visited.
(2) When a store visit is started at some stores, the screen goes blank and cannot be operated.
The same problem is occurring at other stores.

The same thing is happening to other members who are visiting other stores, so we would appreciate it if you could take care of this problem.
Thank you in advance.

______________________________________________________
Datahub Ion様

description: [S-Pro] [Zakka][PG] TRAX SSO login issue via SPro/PingID
long_description:
Hi Datahub Ion,

Could you please ask S-Pro development team to investigate below issue?

Issue: TRAX SSO login error vis S-Pro/Ping ID
Description:
1. TRAX users cannot access explorer/mobile app via S-Pro/PingID SSO login (S-Pro users can access S-Pro via PingID SSO login)
2. There is no SSO setting change both in TRAX and S-Pro side. 
 The SSO flow is: user  TRAX  S-Pro  Ping ID
 TRAX – SPro connection setting info is here
  
3. However when the user tries to login TRAX, this error log is appeared in S-Pro:
 In colum3 "種別(type)", it says the connection type is SAML, which is the connection between S-pro and PingID
 In row2, 8 it says "失敗: InResponse Toが無効です (Failed: InResponse To is invalid)"
 Some issue in SPro-PingID SAML connection can be assumed
 

Request to S-Pro development team:
1. Please double-check whether there is no setting change that may affect SSO login
2. Please share possible cause/case for "Failed: InResponse To is invalid" error
3. Please share possible cause/case for SPro-PingID SSO login error
I'm also working with TRAX and PingID team but really appreciate if S-Pro team could also support investigation.

Please let me know if there is any! Thank you.

Best regards,
Sue OU / 王 思瀛
E-mail: wang.s.53@pg.com
P&G Japan (Market Operations): Information Technology
rootcause:
, L3 Team found that the login session of trax was changed, it would automatically logout, it would cause user to do the login action more frequent than before, the approve request page was also displayed frequently. So to change this frequent Display L3 changed this setting.
 

After this change only verified Profile which were added in the connect apps setting were able to login in the app.
 

So earlier it had only few Profile due to which some of the profile which were not added here , they were not able to login .
resolution_notes: We have added all the profiles that are available in SPRO. Hence anyone with any profile can login now without any issue. This issue will not be repeated in future

long_description:

                                      カインズ熊本宇土店 　2002905874 

______________________________________________________


Affected user : 　za922md@icloud.com
                                      カインズ熊本宇土店 　2002905874 

活動中に突然アプリが終了してしまう 。店頭活動後にSpro画面を開いた際にログイン画面に戻っており、再度チェックインが必要のため、正しい正しい活動時間が反映されていない。
rootcause: The application returns to login page because of IOS memory recycling, and the TimeInOutlet is updated when user clicks the Continue visit button, that's why user thinks the visit duration time is incorrect.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][External]In the S-Pro HQ PO and get a confirmation POP UP and can't go back to the next step or the previous page.
long_description:
Inquiry Category: S-Pro 
Inquiry contents: Other 
MDS: 長島早苗 
User ID: za482md1@icloud.com 
Password: East2408 
Store Name： セイジョー ヘルスケア川口店 
RT code： 2001406427 

Details: 
In the S-Pro HQ activity instructions, I get a confirmation POP UP that says "For questions answered Yes/No, please choose the reason from the options available" and I cannot go back to the next step or the previous page.
I checked all the instructions by connecting the web and looking at the S-Pro screen of MDS, and confirmed that YES and No answers and the reason for No were entered if No was selected.
Since I could not move from the HQ activity instructions, I force closed S-Pro and logged in again. When I resumed from where I left off, the photos I was supposed to have taken disappeared. 
The same problem occurred in September, and the visit history itself disappeared when the system was force-quit. 

Countermeasures already taken: 
　Turn off the iPad and then turn it on: Not implemented 
　Re-login: Implemented 
　Data output: Not implemented 
　Initialization: Not done 
　Reinstallation: Not done

description: [REKBD:TRAX] [SFDC JP] Gillette Open Sales Data Missing
long_description:

Impacted Tables: retail_exec_fct
Impacted SSID/CUST_ID/CNTRT_ID: N/A
Blob Storage: dpsalesfundrekbd
Describe impact on application: There is missing Gillette Open Sales data between Oct`22 and Oct`24 for SFDC JP

rootcause: Blades & Razors is a sub category of the category [男性カミソリ関連]. The dailyforecast data for [男性カミソリ関連] is collected by users on the S-Pro application, the data for Blades & Razors is calculated depending on [男性カミソリ関連].
resolution_notes: As we have received confirmation from L2 to close the ticket.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][PG]Unable to view S-Pro
long_description:
I am unable to check the MCC contact document in S-Pro.
We would like to view it as it is also used by the RHQ staff for confirmation.
Please could you check so that we can view it.
Thank you in advance.
______________________________________________________

[S-Pro] 【s-pro閲覧できません】MCC　RHQ担当
ご担当者様

お疲れ様です。
s-proでMCCの連絡文書が確認できません。
RHQ担当も確認に使用するので、閲覧させて頂きたく存じます。
お手数ですが、閲覧できるようご確認いただけますでしょうか。
何卒よろしくお願いいたします。
rootcause:
1)The reason why the November dashboard is not being displayed is because MCC is not subject to RTIR OSA for November, so it is not a display problem.
2) If the data for past months such as October should be displayed without any problem, but it is not displayed even after reconfirmation by Takanashi-san,If the data is not displayed even after reconfirmation by Takanashi, Sun will do quick meeting to identify and resolve the problem.

As per Sun,
If it is S-Pro OSA dashboard display, there is no MCC-related OSA information for November, so everyone is showing no data.
If it exists on S-Pro, such as past months, and others are seeing it, but only Mr. Takanashi is unable to see it,
Possible data problem.
resolution_notes:
As per Takanashi-san,

We see that perhaps we are not on the same page,
We will check separately to see if there is another way to check.
Thank you for your confirmation.

and as per Sun, we can proceed with ticket closing as per Takanashi-san reply.

rootcause: The reason that the status is shown as uncompleted is that the question includes a price section, but it doesn't have any content. So the price section is not displayed on the mobile as designed. But it's still included in the calculation of status. It's kind of a bug, we'll fix it in the next version.
resolution_notes:
As discussed with Aniket, we got the information that business had confirmed to remove the pricetag section, that was why we removed the pricetag section as a workaround. We've reverted it back now.
In addition, if the pricetag section is really needed, user can add content to it, then the issue also can be resolved.

We received below update from business,
ツルハ西日本グループ（TNG) PO 1
We have confirmed that "Other Activities" 「その他活動」has been disabled.
Thank you for your cooperation.
 
Please close this matter. Proceed with the ticket closing.

We will go to the store today, and if there is no discrepancy in the location information, we will contact you again.

MiraiJP, Ion

お疲れ様です。
Sproの不一致についてご報告させていただきます。
11月に入ってからSproに担当店舗の名前が載るようになったものの、位置情報が一致しません。

②2000641144　西友三鷹牟礼店　11月5日、19日

---------------------------------
立見 梢　Tatsumi Kozue
P&G Japan Sales
〒104-0031 東京都中央区京橋2-2-1 京橋エドグラン15F
Tel: 070-7964-0811
E-mail: tatsumi.k@pg.com
---------------------------------
rootcause:
L2 have checked these 3 Stores and cannot find the geo code of these stores.
These Stores were created in 2017 and since then they were under Non-census Dummy user and did not have any GEO code since they were created. Recently the owner of the Store was changed but the GEO Code was not added due to which the discrepancy is shown.
resolution_notes: Geo Code has been updated. Received ticket closure confirmation.

description: Outlook Issues | Regarding Email"One or more of your Salesforce certificates expires soon.eml"
long_description:
Hi Team,

EE Name：Osamu Murakami
T#：tj2784
ShortName：murakami.o
EE Email address：murakami.o@pg.com
Issue：
EE received the attached email "One or more of your Salesforce certificates expires soon.eml" and asked GetHelp what action is required.
GetHelp gave the following advice in response.
If you are a P&G In store Execution Admin, it seems that "For more information, including how to control who receives this email, refer to Certificates and Keys in Salesforce Help." is relevant. If you are not a P&G In store Execution Admin, no action is required (please ignore the email).
However, EE said "I would like to know how to check if I am a P&G In store Execution Admin." 
How can he check?

Thank you.














-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Original:
Call back number: +1819098651319
Relevant KB  KB0539242
1. Describe issue: 
Please check the following two emails to see if they are spam.
・FW_ One or more of your Salesforce certificates expires soon.eml
・FW_ Friday, December 13, 2024 - Networks daily quarantined summary.eml
2. Is Account locked in IdentityCentral.pg.com:  No
3. Does User have office License: (If No then ask the user to raise office license through itaccess)：Yes
4. Troubleshooting steps taken: 
How to Report a Phishing or Spam Email
KB0012362
https://pgglobalenterprise.service-now.com/esc?id=kb_article&table=kb_knowledge&sys_id=b44a67ca4713061849154a4c416d439a&recordUrl=kb_view.do%3Fsysparm_article%3DKB0012362
5. If issue is not resolved then assign to L2：No


以下の２つのメールがSPAM Mailか確認してほしい。
１） Friday, December 13, 2024 - Networks daily quarantined summary.eml
２） One or more of your Salesforce certificates expires soon.eml

ーーー
ご連絡の１）につきましては、フィッシング報告をいたしました。
恐れ入りますが、２）につきましては、自身が対象かわからない状況です。
可能であれば、確認方法につきまして、ご教示をお願いいたします。
rootcause: This email was not a phising mail.As one of our Salesforce SelfSigned Certificate were expiring, all the admin users recived this mail.Although there is nothing to worry about as we have already renewed the selfsigned certificate.
resolution_notes: Received confirmation for ticket closure.

Haruka Konomi / 木稲 春花

Tel : 070-7964-0816
Email : konomi.h@pg.com
rootcause:
I have checked the Geo code for these 3 stores and as I can see when these stores were created in 2017 & 2024 no Geo Code was provided that's why Geo mismatch is shown.
Regarding store not shown, This store owner was changed in September MST Loading and there is no USTM record provided by the business for konomi.h@pg.com and 2002903758 linkage. This is why the store is not visible to the user. Business would need to provide USTM record for this user and store, only then user can visit the store.
resolution_notes:
1. 2001647134- Updated the account owner from konomi.h@pg.com- Non-census account. Deactivated the USTM record under the store. Here after mentioned store will not show under the user.
2. 2002903758 – Updated the account owner from za665md@icloud.com to konomi.h@pg.com . Correspondence to USTM we have created new record under the user konomi.h@pg.com and deactivated the old one. User can access the store in their I-pad.
Received confirmation from Yano-san to close the ticket.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][EXTERNAL]When visiting a store with a follow-up call application, reported information is not displayed.

rootcause: During the Follow-up call creation we have created some CHQ record where SVID and MDSID was same and due to this there was a conflict in access level of the user. When SV was trying to approve the PO, system grants the read only permission to MDS. SV needs edit permission to approve the PO, but during the approval, system tries to update this SV's permission to read only. During discussion with L3 we found that MDS column is not necessary for Follow-up request.
resolution_notes: Business has confirmed the data and acknowledge the root cause. Received ticket closure confirmation.

resolution_notes:
If user answered the PO answer, it should be uploaded together with photos. we currently find only the photos, and also can't find PO answer in the logs. In addition, we can find the PO answer uploaded by the other SV via follow call, so we think the function should work correctly.

There is no history found in backend for responses on Wednesday, 1/22 and Friday, 1/24.

Received below from business,

We understand that there was no history of responses on 1/22 (Wed.) and 1/24 (Fri.) on the back end as well.

Also, since its reported no problems in other users' reported cases
We will tell them to confirm to answered at the end of the visit.

Please close this matter.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][PG]Unable to login S-Pro
long_description:
Since last month, we have had a series of mechanical failures, including S-Pro synchronization failures, and there was a case in which the results did not reflect what we had reported and completed synchronization on the most recent RT call.

I just tried to log in to reconfirm the issue, but the login itself is no longer available.

My ID is nishimura.h.



______________________________________________________
DataHub　ご担当者様

お疲れ様です。SLSの西村です。

先月からS-Proの同期不良を始めとして機械不良が続いており、直近のRTコールで報告をして同期も完了した内容が実績に反映されていない事例が発生しました。

先ほどそちらの再確認をしようとログインを試みたのですが、ログイン自体ができなくなってしまいました。

Get Helpのご担当者様にご確認をしたところ、こちらに問い合わせてくださいとのことだったのでこちらでご連絡失礼いたします。

私のIDはnishimura.hです。

ご不明点等ございましたらご連絡ください。

何卒よろしくお願いいたします。
=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
  西村広海／Hiromi Nishimura
        P&G Japan 合同会社 営業統括本部
    Tel: 080-20054002
Email:nishimura.h@pg.com

五十嵐　恵
telephone：080-9592-6613
-------------------------*-*-*-*
rootcause:
We have just checked the USTM record for these 3 stores and found that , for this user these 3 accounts are only for followup call , and for follow-up call we keep the "MonthlyCallTarget__c' value empty as per the business logic. This is why the Gap is shown as -1, 0.

For user - pb15md@icloud.com, We have created 3 USTM records with these 3 account (2001679105 ビックカメラ ラゾーナ川崎店, 2002238015 ビックカメラ相模大野駅店, 2003288100 ヤマダ電機 テックランドスーパービバホーム長津田店) but these records are only for followup call and not for normal call , this is why Actual , Target and Gap might appear wrong as we have to keep those value empty.
resolution_notes:
There is no changes required in Master data file. We have corrected the call target for the mentioned stores.
Received ticket closure confirmation.

対象ユーザー 
ユーザーID：　pb51md@icloud.com
店舗名：　2003290540　ノジマエミテラス所沢店

状況
・目標数が0になっています。（画像1）
・初期化、同期しましたが変わらずです。


■画像1
 


実施済対応策
iPadの電源OFF→ON：　実施
再ログイン：　実施
データ出力：　実施
初期化：　実施
再インストール：　未実施

どうぞよろしくお願いいたします。
rootcause:
We found that the stores USTM record was created under the Electro Jan 2025 revision file under the request number RITM6495820.

Since January, the business has implemented the follow-up visit process. In February 2025, the L-3 team worked on the backend to add the additional call target field in the USTM record. For records created under follow-up requests, the call target should be empty, and the value for the added field should be set to True. The remaining records can be set to False for identification purposes.

As part of the L-2 action, In March ,We updated the both field based on the creation date. Consequently, the specified USTM record was included in the file.
resolution_notes:
As part of the L-2 action, In March ,We updated the both field based on the creation date. Consequently, the specified USTM record was included in the file.

We have updated the records under request number RITM6495820 according to the business requirements. Now, the call target and additional call target fields are displaying as expected.
Business has confirmed that it can be displayed correctly on the user side.
Received confirmation for ticket closure.

rootcause: As per our investigation we found that the documents and survey photos are both saved in the file object, the download limitation of file object currently is 1000, which means at most 1000 recent file records can be downloaded to the mobile. These documents were in the past, when querying the file records, they were out of the limitation,
resolution_notes:
after refreshing the timestamp of those documents, they can be downloaded to the mobile. L3 Team have deployed a batch to process them, we will check why it didn't work this time and improve it.
Business has confirmed the issue has been resolved. Received confirmation for ticket closure.

rootcause: As per our investigation we found that the documents were uploaded after KAM assigned the PO. When KAM edits the PO including PO content and related documents, KAM needs to re-assign the PO, this is why the document was not visible to certain users.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][EXTERNAL][埼玉16-20]Stores not showing up
long_description:
Dear person in charge

Thank you for your assistance.

Today while visiting a store on the attached unreflected list, the store suddenly stopped showing up.
Also, when the SV with this ID tries to add the store in Salesforce in follow call mode, it no longer appears.
* mi-sato@fiks.co.jp

The above SV is tied to 3 other areas (Saitama 16-20, Saitama 36-20, Tokyo 76-20).
All of them are now hidden.
I would like to visit this store tomorrow, so I would appreciate it if you could solve this problem as soon as possible.

Thank you very much.

______________________________________________________

ご担当者様

お世話になっております。

本日添付の未反映リストにある店舗に訪店中に突然店舗が表示されなくなりました。
また、このIDのSVがsalesforceでフォローコールモードで店舗を追加しようとしても表示されなくなりました。
※ mi-sato@fiks.co.jp

上記SVが他に3エリア（埼玉16-20,埼玉36-20,東京76-20）紐づけているのですが
全て非表示になってしまいました。
こちら明日訪店したい為、早期解決していただきたくお願い申し上げます。
rootcause: This issue is persists because the store owner user account is inactive due to no login for 3 months.
resolution_notes: We have activated the MDS and granted the Ebest license. If the MDS wants to access the store, We need to wait for the batch job to reflect the changes in the PO sharing list.SV user has confirm can access the scheduled the follow up visit for the store. Recieved confirmation the issue has been resolved and received confirmation for ticket closure.

and I cannot check it.
Is it not possible for the person in charge of RHQ to check it?
Or is there a different way to check?
We would appreciate it if you could check.
Thank you in advance for your cooperation.
______________________________________________________

ご担当者様

お疲れ様です。
S-oroにて、CHQカテゴリーご担当の方にて実施いただいたMDS様へのアンケートを確認したいのですが、
下記の表示になってしまい、確認できません。
RHQ担当者では確認できないのでしょうか。
それとも確認方法が異なるのでしょうか。
お手数ですが、ご確認いただけますと幸いです。
何卒よろしくお願いいたします。
rootcause: As per our investigation the screenshot shared by the user seems to be irrelevant to this incident. Survey access have not dependent on RHQ , it depends on CHQ only. We have checked the CHQ for the survey and we can find this user under the sharing list of the account group.
resolution_notes: L1 has shared file from Sun, and Sun and other SDO has guided user to check the correct report and filter. Business has confirmed to close the ticket.

description: Singapore: SPRO is not available.
long_description:
SPRO is not available. The cause is unknown.

Application version: iPadOS Version: 18.5 Model Number: MK473J/A Serial Number: M2K9GH3JCF
Device Version: iPadOS Version: 18.5 Model Number: MK473J/A Serial Number: M2K9GH3JCF
rootcause: This error is shown to this user because the application isn't trusted by the Ipad.
resolution_notes:
To Trust the application you would need to go to VPN Settings of the device.


Enter into VPN Settings and there SPRO would be available in non-trusted application , there would have to click on the application and then select "Trust".


Once the application is trusted you would need to restart the ipad and then check.

VGP EXPERTに結果が反映されず、未達となっています。（画像1, 2）

五十嵐　恵
080-9592-6613
-------------------------*-*-*-*
rootcause:
According to our analysis we found that :
1. The initial result is provided by business, it's in the VGPQuestionDetail object.
2. There's a daily batch to convert the VGPQuestionDetail data to VGPAnalyze object. The result user view in the prepare step is from VGPQuestionDetail, the result user view after check-in is from VGPAnalyze.
3. After user completes the pre-visit and Trax returns the recognition result, system calculates the VGP question answers depending on the recognition items included in the Trax Json file. The result is refreshed to the VGPAnalyze
resolution_notes:
4. We will be Uploading VGP Expert tonight which is data from Friday , so if user completes the pre-visit, it should be the current result based on the recognition

Business has confirmed the issue has been resolved.Received confirmation for ticket closure.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][PG]5188 南アルプス倉庫店  S-Pro failure
long_description:
Thank you for all your help.

When I try to add a schedule for a visit to S-Pro at 5188 南アルプス倉庫店, I do not see any items to select, such as the warehouse store name, as it appears at other warehouse stores.
I would appreciate it if you could tell me how to handle this issue.

Thank you in advance.
______________________________________________________

森田様、孫様
いつもお世話になっております。

5188 南アルプス倉庫店にて、

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][External]Confirmation of password reset request by the user itself.
long_description:
We would like to confirm a password reset request by a user who has lost his/her password.


The situation is as follows: 
We have often requested a password reset for the following situation: 
Is it not possible to reset the password by the user himself/herself?
Is it impossible for the user to reset the password?


If user get a password error and cannot log in, tap the "Forgot your password? Tap "Forgot your password?

 

Tap the link in the notification e-mail → It will be taken to the login screen again instead of the password change screen.

 


So user can't log in and retry the same thing several times and it locks  out and  can't reset the password.

 




Thank you in advance for your cooperation.


______________________________________________________

Samurai Pro サポートチーム
ご担当者様

いつも大変お世話になっております。
パスワードが分からなくなった際の、リセット要求について確認になります。


状況
度々、下記のような状況になり、パスワード設定をご依頼しておりますが
ユーザー本人によるパスワードリセットはできない仕様でしょうか？
それとも操作手順に誤りがございますでしょう？


・パスワードエラーが出てログインできなくなり、「パスワードをお忘れですか？」をタップ

 

・通知メールのリンクをタップ　→パスワード変更画面でなく、再度ログイン画面になる

 


・ログインできないため、何度か同じことを再試行するとロックされて、パスワードリセットもできなくなる

 




どうぞよろしくお願いいたします。

五十嵐　恵
080-9592-6613
-------------------------*-*-*-*
rootcause: As per our investigation we found that the user was not able to reset the password as he was trying to reset after attempting 3 wrong password , which led to account lockout. If user have forgot the password he can follow the same step which is provided in the mail but if user tries the same step after attempting 3 wrong password then he won't be able to reset it .
resolution_notes:
Ask user to clear browser cookies before performing password reset. 
Received ticket closure confirmation from business.

Received ticket closure confirmation.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][PG]AEON Chushikoku Attached file can be visible to MDSs mapped to AEON Nishinihon??
long_description:
I have copied the following file for Aeon Chugoku and Shikoku into the Aeon West Japan PO, but it does not appear to be displayed on the MDS iPad.

To make it appear on the MDS iPad, would it be possible to change the store group below to Aeon West Japan?

I am contacting you in reference to INC14230917.

I would appreciate it if you could enlighten me.
______________________________________________________

Help Desk sama

下記イオン中四国のファイルですが、　イオン西日本の　本部活動指示の中にコピーしているのですが、　MDSのiPadには表示されていないようです。

MDSのiPadに表示させるには、　下記の店舗グループを　イオン西日本に変更することで見えるのでしょうか？

こちら　INC14230917　の件を踏まえてご連絡しております。

ご教授おいただけると助かります
rootcause:
As per our investigation though the user links this file to AEON West PO, the related account group is still for イオン中四国-Zakka[
3000000011] and this account group has been deactivated. that's why user still can't download this file record and can't view the documents in the application.
resolution_notes: Correct the account group in this PO , and then it should be visible.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][PG]The visit duration gets reset in the middle of a call.
long_description:
Regarding S-pro, we are still experiencing a recurring issue in June where the visit duration is frequently reset to 0 minutes.
After pressing the "Visit" button and completing activities such as meetings or shelf stocking, the screen is turned back on, and the time is found to have been reset.

We have reinstalled S-pro about three times, but the issue has not been resolved.

Affected user : Miyoshi, Hana <miyoshi.h@pg.com> 

______________________________________________________

Help Desｋ様

Miyoshi sanより　下記お問合せいただいております。　　かい月策をご教授いただけないでしょうか？　毎回のコールで発生しているわけではなく、時々発生するようです

S-proについてなのですが、6月度も度々滞在時間が０分になってしまう不具合が起きています。いつも訪店ボタンを押したのちに商談、品出し等を終えて再度画面をつけると、時間がリセットされてしまいます。
3度ほどS-proをダウンロードしなおしましたが、直っておりません。どなたにご相談すればよいか教えていただければ幸いです。


よろしくお願いします
Yano
rootcause:
As per our analysis, Visit Duration = TimeOutOutlet - TimeInOutlet, every time user clicks the start call or continue, the TimeInOutlet is refreshed. The Call Date is the time that user clicks the start call button, and it won't be changed even user leaves the call and then continues the visit.
For example:
1. User starts the call and check-in at 8:00, at the moment, both the call date and TimeInoutlet are 8:00
2. User clicks the back button to returns to the home page
3. User continues the call at 9:00, at the moment, the call date is still 8:00, the TimeInoutlet is changed to 9:00, the visit duration is reset
Upon checking the call records uploaded by the user, there are total 6 call records whose call date doesn't equal to the TimeInoutlet, The NoBreak of 4 of them are true, which means user clicked the back button to leave the call during the visit. Regarding the other 2 records, I think it happened because of the IOS memory recycling.

we can't control the IOS memory recycling, when IOS validates that the run-time memory is not enough, IOS clears the APP running in the backend as priority. Hence we don't have workaround so far, memory recycling is a known issue
resolution_notes: Close after no update after 2nd attempt.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka]同期ログから訪店履歴が消えてしまった
long_description:
■対象ユーザー
ユーザーID：　za712md@icloud.com

■該当店舗
2002534905 ココカラファインコープ和泉中央店
2002935360 ココカラファインエコールいずみ店
2002338373 コーナン泉北二号小代店

■状況
・8/4（月）に訪店した3店舗の同期ログが消えてしまい、salesforceからもコールデータが確認できない状況です。
・8/5（火）にログインエラーが発生し、アプリの再インストールを実施しており、その時は履歴も問題なかったとのことです。
・ココカラファインの2店舗については、同日のTrax撮影履歴があります。（画像1, 2）
・訪店計画には「コーナン泉北二号小代店」だけが残っていました。（画像3）

データ出力実施済みです。
消えてしまったコールを復元することは可能でしょうか？
rootcause:
I find some failed upload logs for Aug 4th, the reason is that the related record is deleted, The VGP Transaction for June was modified, and whose related VGP Question Detail record had been deleted, we keep the VGP Question Detail for only 2 months.
Regarding the VGP Transaction issue reported it's a bug of application, we'll fix it in the next version. as a workaround, we'll recover the VGP Detail data for June.
resolution_notes: Business has confirmed the visit plan and call data have been restored. Received ticket closure confirmation.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka]Adhocサーベイ「ランドリー・柔軟剤売場状況確認」の前回回答が消えてしまう
long_description:
■対象ユーザー
ユーザーID：　za8md@icloud.com
店舗名：　2002514611 ツルハ北見とん田西町店

・salesforceのレポート上では、8/8（金）に報告した回答が確認できます。（画像2）

参照レポート：　【検証用】ランドリー・柔軟剤売場状況確認_2002514611
https://jppaperlesssfa.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00ObV0000010VhZUAU/view?queryScope=userFolders


「ヘアケア売場状況確認」の方は、前回の回答が残っているとのことですが、これは設定上、正常な状態でしょうか？
rootcause: The survey type was initially set to SKU and later changed back to Survey, which caused the answers to disappear on the iPad. However, we have confirmed that the survey transaction for this survey group and user exists in the backend.
resolution_notes:
Although the user may not be able to view the survey responses on the iPad, the data is safely stored in the backend. Therefore, no action is required from the user.

The user can proceed with other surveys or visit other stores, and their responses will be visible. For this particular month, the user can ignore the affected survey.Business has acknowledge, Received confirmation for ticket closure.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka]訪店予定追加に一部店舗が２重表示される
long_description:
■対象ユーザー
ユーザーID：　za6md@icloud.com
店舗名：　2003214179 ツルハドラッグ釧路星が浦店

■状況
訪店予定追加のリストに２重表示されています。 （画像1）
rootcause: While preparing the USTM file, the system was expected to retrieve the Account ID for the specified store; however, due to the presence of duplicate account numbers in the system, the USTM was not created for the intended user account and was instead generated for a non-census account. To prevent this issue from recurring, we have removed the duplicate account number from the system.
resolution_notes:
Moving forward, it is essential to clarify the business requirement—if account numbers are expected to be unique, then enforcing this constraint and performing similar cleanup actions will be necessary.

Business has confirmed the issue has been resolved and requested to close the ticket.

description: ツルハ西日本グループ（TNG)-Zakkaの連絡文書内のCHQ情報が空欄です。　ツルハグループ西日本のCHQ情報を転記ください

rootcause:
Operation miss from backend.
After the business requested a CHQId change at the end of August, step 2 of the required procedure — changing the CHQId and the Name of the Account Group for the CHQ after updating the UserMapping and before the next AccountGroup daily job — was missed.
resolution_notes: Business acknowledge the root cause and requested to close the ticket.

description: 本部活動指示がiPad上に表示されない
long_description: Takahashi, Tomoki <takahashi.t@pg.com> 　さんがツルハドラッグ本部活動指示がipad上表示されない状況です、表示される様に対応お願いします。
rootcause:
Until Nov 5th, the KAM takahashi.t@pg.com didn't cover any store belongs to the CHQ 3000000101, so the PO for this CHQ wasn't downloaded to the user. 
On Nov 5th, ownership of two CHQ stores were transferred to takahashi.t@pg.com, while store information was successfully downloaded after an incremental sync, but the PO wasn't, because the timestamp of the PO wasn't refreshed.
resolution_notes: If user completes the initial sync, the PO would also be displayed.

description: [S-Pro][Electro][PG]PO setting for ツルハグループ西日本 (Electro)
long_description:

For this case, it was sent to ebisu.a@pg.com (Zakka). 
Please verify that it was definitely sent to the Electro Team Type.
rootcause: During L2's user mapping creation, the team type was mistakenly set to "Electro" instead of "Zakka," causing the Electro PO to be sent to the user.
resolution_notes: The user mapping has now been corrected, and the issue is resolved.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][PG] Regarding the December 12月強化POSM_ad hoc (Unable to extract data on PC)
long_description:
■Unable to extract NO responses
Unable to extract question IDs: Q-0019547, Q-0019549

Business think that this might be because column P in the attached data (raw list of surveys in progress) is set to FALSE (i.e., non-ACTIVE status).
The SalesForce screen appears as the screenshot attached(the ACTIVE checkbox on the far right is not ticked):
https://jppaperlesssfa.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00O41000007vfsLEAQ/view?queryScope=userFolders

Note that these records were visible and editable in the MDS ad-hoc view. The issue solely affects data extraction on the PC.

______________________________________________________

[S-Pro]  12月強化POSM_ad hocにつきまして（PC上データ抽出できない）
Sun san Helpdesk sama
下記お問い合わせいただいています。　
対応をおねがいできないでしょうか？

よろしくお願いします

■NO回答の抽出が出来ない状況です
抽出できないquestionID　QZL

恐らくですが、添付データ（発行中調査一覧のraw）のP列がFALSE（=非ACTIVEの設定になっている）のためかと思います。
Spro画面は以下になります（一番右端のACTIVEにチェックが入っていない）
https://jppaperlesssfa.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Report/00O41000007vfsLEAQ/view?queryScope=userFolders
 

なお、MDSのアドホックでは表示されていて入力も可能でした。出来ないのは、PC上でのデータ抽出のみです。


Junko Yano
rootcause: These questions are not visible in the report because the nested survey templates are always marked as inactive.
resolution_notes:
Business has confirmed that the issue has been resolved internally by verifying their settings.
Received ticket closure confirmation.

description: [S-Pro][Zakka][INC14884800--SD-335055--SD-336172]Traxの撮影時にタップ操作で任意のオートフォーカスができない
long_description:
■対象ユーザー
ユーザーID：　za18md@icloud.com

■状況
以前のバージョンであればタップ操作でオートフォーカスができたのですが 
最新バージョン[1.56.3]になってから、タップ操作ができず、自動でオートフォーカス動作が始まるまでピントが合わせられなくなっています。（画面録画1）

これはアプリの仕様でしょうか？
もし不具合でしたら改善方法はありますでしょうか？

long_description:
■対象ユーザー

店舗名：　2003226346 サンドラッグ岩沼相の原店

データ出力実施済みです。

・サクラMBCIのPOSM設置確認（Adhoc Survey 20251229 RITM7651552）
・Top10 VGP 達成状況（Adhoc Survey 20260501 調査項目）
rootcause: The user may have responded to the questions using the previous survey template, but the responses were uploaded only after L2 deleted the old survey template to incorporate the changes requested by the business.
resolution_notes: Since the survey template was deleted and replaced with the updated version, all associated transactions were also removed. Therefore, the report history for 5th January will not be available, as the earlier survey template (along with its transactions) no longer exists.
